changeSet.author: cursor
changeSet.comment: Seed PERM_*_DELETE authorities for module-level delete control.
changeSet.sql: insert into jhi_authority (name) select authority_name from ( values ('PERM_DASHBOARD_DELETE'), ('PERM_BUSINESSES_DELETE'), ('PERM_PARTIES_DELETE'), ('PERM_ITEMS_DELETE'), ('PERM_ASSETS_DELETE'), ('PERM_SALES_DELETE'), ('PERM_PURCHASES_DELETE'), ('PERM_PAYMENTS_DELETE'), ('PERM_ACCOUNTS_DELETE'), ('PERM_EXPENSES_DELETE'), ('PERM_REPORTS_DELETE'), ('PERM_AUDIT_DELETE'), ('PERM_ROLE_ACCESS_DELETE') ) as t(authority_name) where not exists ( select 1 from jhi_authority a where a.name = t.authority_name );
